# Platform Boundary Table

| Platform / regulator | Boundary relevant to manufactured traction |
|---|---|
| FTC | Prohibits fake reviews/testimonials, sentiment-conditioned reviews, undisclosed insider reviews, review suppression, fake social media influence indicators |
| ACCC | Social-media promotions must not mislead; material connections such as gifts/payment matter |
| YouTube | Prohibits artificial increases in views, likes, comments, or other metrics |
| TikTok | Prohibits fake engagement, bulk account operation, covert influence operations, and recommendation manipulation |
| X | Prohibits inauthentic activity around source, identity, popularity, and platform manipulation |
| Meta | Deprioritizes unoriginal content, impersonation, and spammy/fake engagement patterns |
| LinkedIn | Limits reach of engagement pods and automated comments |
| GitHub | Prohibits rank abuse such as automated starring/following and inauthentic activity |
| Product Hunt | Prohibits bots, incentivized upvotes, mass upvote requests, and artificial activity |
| Apple App Store | Removes fraudulent ratings/reviews and apps manipulating charts/search |
| Google Play / Maps | Prohibits fake or incentivized ratings/reviews and manipulation of app/business placement |
| Google Search | Targets scaled content abuse, site reputation abuse, and expired domain abuse |
